series_metadata.series_description: Reports, minutes, correspondence and related meterials generated by the GI Promise Council and staff related to the administration of the GI Promise Bill. These documents are included in our constituent correspondence, conference planning, state and college contacts, SOC-ACE, and independent projects.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years in offsite storage, or until audited by the Auditor of State and audit report is released, then review by State Archives. ; Electronic: 5 years, or until audited by the Auditor of State and audit report is released, then transfer to disc and send to State Archives for review., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
